name: [Admin] Add pull request to project board
description: Automatically adds non-draft PRs targeting the develop branch to the GitHub project board. Triggers when PRs are opened, reopened, synchronized, or marked as ready for review.

name: [Admin] Check for linked issues in PRs
description: Checks that every PR has a linked issue. If no linked issue is found, it posts a comment asking the author to link one. PRs targeting release, dependabot, and main branches are excluded from this requirement.

name: [Admin] Check if PR is from an experience team
description: Checks whether a PR author is a member of the flagship-mobile-team. If the author is not a team member (i.e., from an experience team), sends a Slack notification to va-mobile-app alerting designated contacts.

name: [Admin] Flagship Mobile Alerts Weekly On-Call Assignment
description: Posts the weekly on-call assignment to the va-mobile-app-alerts Slack channel every Monday. Fetches the current on-call person from PagerDuty, sends a Slack notification, and updates the channel topic.

name: [Admin] Milestone Linker
description: Automatically links the nearest upcoming milestone to a PR's linked issue (or the PR itself) when a PR touching app source code is merged. Ensures all merged work is tracked under the correct release milestone.

name: [Admin] Notify Slack of DevOps issues
description: When a new issue with the 'devops' label is opened, adds it to the DevOps project board with "Ready to Work" status and sends a Slack notification to the va-mobile-devops channel.

name: [Admin] Notify Slack of new Onboarding requests
description: Sends a Slack notification when a new issue with the 'user-onboarding' label is opened. Looks up Slack IDs for the designated onboarding contacts and posts a message with a link to the issue.

name: [Admin] Prune Stale Branches
description: Deletes remote branches whose last commit is older than 365 days and that have no open PRs. Runs weekly on a schedule (dry-run by default) or manually, uploads a CSV of affected branches, and notifies Slack with a summary.

name: [Admin] Team Membership Alert
description: Monitors the flagship-mobile-team GitHub team for new members. Runs daily, compares current members against a stored list, and notifies Slack when new members are detected. Updates the stored member list accordingly.

name: [Admin] Weekly Flagship Mobile PR Reviewer Assignment
description: Rotates the primary PR reviewer assignment biweekly on Mondays. Updates Slack channel topics for va-mobile-app and va-mobile-app-engineering with the current reviewer and backup, and posts a notification message.

name: [Build] Daily QA Build
description: Runs daily QA builds for iOS and Android on weekday mornings. Queues the build, notifies Slack, and triggers the reusable build_ios and build_android workflows with default QA settings.

name: [Build] On Demand Build
description: Manually triggered on-demand builds for iOS and Android. Accepts environment (staging/production) and notes as inputs, queues the build, notifies Slack, and runs both platform builds from the triggering branch.

name: [Build] Optimize Image
description: Optimizes App Store screenshots for iOS and Android on pushes to release branches. Uses imagemin to compress images in-place, then commits the optimized files back to the release branch.

name: [Build] Queue Build
description: Reusable workflow that queues builds by waiting for any older in-progress build workflows (QA, On Demand, Release, RC) to finish before allowing the current build to proceed. Prevents concurrent build conflicts.

name: [Build] Release Build
description: Builds production release builds for iOS and Android, triggered by a v*.*.* tag (created when /approve is commented on the release ticket). Queues the build, notifies Slack, runs both platform builds, and alerts on failure.

name: [Build] Release Candidate Build
description: Builds release candidate (RC) staging builds for iOS and Android, triggered by an RC-v*.*.* tag pushed from new_release_branch.yml at the end of each sprint. Queues the build, notifies Slack, and runs iOS and Android RC builds in parallel for QA validation and regression testing.

name: [Build] Reusable Android Workflow
description: Reusable Android build workflow. Sets up the Linux environment, installs dependencies, decodes signing keys, bundles the app, and runs the specified Fastlane lane (qa, rc, review, release, on_demand) to build and distribute.

environment.description: App environment variables to use (test, staging, production)

lane.description: Fastlane lane to run (qa, rc, review, release, on_demand)

notes.description: Release notes for Firebase (defaults to "New QA version for {{DATE_TIME}}")

ps_track.description: Google Play Console track to distribute to (defaults to "Development Team")

ref.description: Branch or tag to build from (defaults to triggering ref)

slack_thread_ts.description: Slack thread timestamp for build status messages

version.description: Version for production release (QA/on-demand builds auto-increment)

name: [Build] Reusable iOS Workflow
description: Reusable iOS build workflow. Sets up the macOS environment, installs dependencies, decodes signing keys, bundles the app, and runs the specified Fastlane lane (qa, rc, review, release, on_demand) to build and distribute.

environment.description: App environment variables to use (test, staging, production)

lane.description: Fastlane lane to run (qa, rc, review, release, on_demand)

notes.description: Release notes for TestFlight (defaults to "New QA version for {{DATE_TIME}}")

ref.description: Branch or tag to build from (defaults to triggering ref)

slack_thread_ts.description: Slack thread timestamp for build status messages

tf_group.description: TestFlight group to distribute to (defaults to "Development Team")

version.description: Version for production release (QA/on-demand builds auto-increment)

name: [Code Quality] Check Native Android Builds
description: Verifies that changes to native Android files do not break the Android build process. Triggers on PRs that modify files under VAMobile/android/ and runs a test-only Android build via the reusable build_android workflow.

name: [Code Quality] Check Native iOS Builds
description: Verifies that changes to native iOS files do not break the iOS build process. Triggers on PRs that modify files under VAMobile/ios/ and runs a test-only iOS build via the reusable build_ios workflow.

name: [Code Quality] Code Checks
description: Runs code quality checks on every PR and push to main/develop/release branches. Includes ESLint, Super-Linter, Jest unit tests (split across 5 matrix chunks), and Android/iOS bundle verification.

name: [Code Quality] CodeQL
description: Runs GitHub CodeQL security analysis on JavaScript code. Triggers on pushes and PRs to develop and weekly on a schedule. Initializes CodeQL, autobuilds the project, and performs the analysis.

name: [Code Quality] Update Bundler
description: Updates Ruby bundler dependencies and Fastlane plugins for both Android and iOS every Wednesday. If any lock files change, commits and pushes them automatically.

name: [Documentation] Accessibility Check
description: Runs axe-core accessibility scans against every page of the documentation site on weekday mornings. Builds the Docusaurus site, crawls the sitemap, checks each URL for accessibility issues, and notifies Slack with the count of pages and errors found.

name: [Documentation] Deploy Site
description: Deploys the Docusaurus documentation site to GitHub Pages. Triggers on pushes to develop that touch documentation files, daily on a schedule, or manually. Builds the site and publishes to the gh-pages branch.

name: [Documentation] Test Build
description: Runs a test build of the Docusaurus documentation site on PRs targeting develop that touch components, documentation, or hooks. Verifies the documentation builds successfully without deploying.

name: [E2E] Android Detox Test Run
description: Runs Detox e2e tests on Android emulator in CI. It bundles the Android app, determines which tests to run, executes them across a matrix, and reports failures to Slack and TestRail.

tests_to_run.description: List tests to test in ["test name", "test name"] format.  Leave blank if running full e2e test.

testRail_name.description: Name testRail run (will default to date if blank)

name: [E2E] Detox Mapping
description: Reusable workflow that determines which Detox e2e tests to run based on changed files in the PR. Reads the detoxMapping.js config to map source file and directory changes to their associated e2e test suites.

name: [E2E] iOS Detox Test Run
description: Runs Detox e2e tests on an iOS simulator in CI. It bundles the iOS app, determines which tests to run, executes them across a matrix, and reports failures to Slack and TestRail.

tests_to_run.description: List tests to test in ["test name", "test name"] format.  Leave blank if running full e2e test.

testRail_name.description: Name testRail run (will default to date if blank)

name: [E2E] Update TestRail Results
description: Reusable workflow that uploads e2e Detox test results (JUnit XML) to TestRail. Finds or creates the appropriate test run, then uses the trcli tool to parse and upload results for each test suite.

testRail_name.description: Name for the TestRail run (defaults to current date if blank)

test_OS_name.description: OS name for the test run (e.g. iOS or Android)

name: [Release] App Store Requirement Checks (Apple)
description: Validates that PRs do not exceed Apple App Store limits for screenshot counts (iPhone, iPad), description length, release notes, keywords, and title. Runs on PRs targeting main/develop/release that touch iOS metadata.

name: [Release] Approve Slash Command
description: Handles the /approve slash command dispatched from issue comments. Triggers the release PR creation process, comments on the release issue with PR links, closes the issue, and notifies Slack on failure.

name: [Release] Check Max File/Character Size
description: Reusable workflow that checks whether a file count or character count exceeds an app store limit. Called by app_store_checks_apple and app_store_checks_google to validate screenshots and metadata sizes.

working_dir.description: Directory to run the counting function in

counting_function.description: Shell command that outputs the count to check against max_size

name: [Release] Gather iOS and Android screenshots
description: Generates App Store screenshots for iOS (iPhone and iPad) and Android using Detox e2e tests in CI. It builds and runs screenshot tests on each platform, combines and frames the images, commits them to the PR branch, and notifies Slack of success or failure.

name: [Release] Go Live
description: Promotes release builds to production in the App Store and Google Play Store. Runs weekly on Tuesdays or manually. Checks environment protections, then triggers the iOS and Android Fastlane release lanes from the main branch.

name: [Release] Merge to main and Create PR to develop
description: Reusable release workflow that merges the release branch to main (squash merge), tags the release version, and creates a PR to merge release changes back into develop. Outputs the develop PR URL and release commit hash.

name: [Release] New Release Branch
description: Cuts a new release branch from develop at the end of each sprint. Runs on a weekly schedule (Wednesdays) or manually. Executes the release_branch.sh script which creates the branch and tags it to trigger the RC build.

name: [Release] New Release Issue
description: Creates a release tracking issue when a new release branch is created. Generates the release ticket with due dates, assigns release approvers, creates a TestRail milestone and RC test run, closes the previous milestone, posts release coordination details to Slack, and waits for manual approval to trigger the release.

name: [Release] Play Store Requirement Checks (Google)
description: Validates that PRs do not exceed Google Play Store limits for screenshot counts (phone, 7-inch tablet), description length, short description, changelog, and title. Runs on PRs targeting main/develop/release that touch Android metadata.

name: [Release] Run approval Workflow
description: Reusable release approval workflow. Triggers the release PR creation process, adds a rocket reaction to the slash command comment, and comments on the release issue with the created PR links upon completion.

version.description: Version number for the release (eg. v1.1.0)

issue_number.description: Release issue number to comment on with PR links

comment_id.description: Comment ID to add a reaction to (for slash command feedback)

name: [Security] Package Dependency Security Check
description: Scans PRs for package.json dependency changes. Detects added, changed, or removed packages, runs GuardDog security analysis, generates a detailed review summary, and requires manual approval for dependency changes via the bypass-package-lock environment protection.

name: [TestRail] Create TestRail Milestone
description: Reusable workflow that creates a new sprint milestone in TestRail. Sets the milestone name to the current two-week sprint date range, marks it as started, and outputs the milestone ID for use by downstream workflows.

name: [TestRail] Start RC Run
description: Reusable workflow that creates a new regression test run in TestRail for a release candidate. Fetches RC test cases, creates the run under the specified milestone, and outputs the TestRail run URL.

milestoneId.description: Milestone id for the run to be associated with
Milestone id for the run to be associated with

name: [TestRail] Update Run
description: Receives a repository_dispatch webhook from TestRail and updates the associated release issue's body with a pie chart showing test run results (passed, blocked, retest, failed, untested).

name: [Utils] Check Maintenance Windows
description: Checks PagerDuty maintenance windows daily and updates them via a Python script. Notifies Slack on success or failure. Can also be triggered manually.

name: [Utils] FE PR Needs Review Reminder
description: Manually triggered workflow that counts open PRs labeled 'FE-Needs Review' and posts the count to a Slack channel as a reminder for the team to review pending frontend PRs.

name: [Utils] Onboarding
description: Placeholder onboarding workflow that triggers when an issue is labeled with 'onboarding'. Currently logs the issue event; Slack notification logic is commented out pending future implementation.

name: [Utils] QA required approval
description: Enforces that PRs modifying app source code have at least one engineer approval and one QA team approval before merging. Checks changed files against inclusion/exclusion patterns and validates review approvals.

name: [Utils] Slash Command Dispatch
description: Listens for issue comments and dispatches recognized slash commands (currently /approve) to their corresponding workflow handlers. Uses the peter-evans/slash-command-dispatch action for parsing and dispatching.

name: [Utils] Start Slack Thread
description: Reusable workflow that posts a message to a Slack channel to start a thread. Looks up the channel ID by name, posts the message, and outputs the thread timestamp and channel ID for downstream workflows to reply to.

channel_name.description: Name of the Slack channel where the thread should be started.

message.description: Text to display for the message starting the thread.

name: Lookup Slack Username
description: Reusable workflow that looks up a Slack user ID from a VA email address or GitHub handle. Maps git handles to emails via a repository variable, validates the @va.gov domain, and queries the Slack API to find the user ID.

va_email.description: VA Email address to lookup Slack ID for

git_handle.description: Git handle to lookup email and then Slack ID for

va_email.description: VA Email address to lookup Slack ID for

git_handle.description: Git handle to lookup email and then Slack ID for

name: UI Approval Check
description: Checks PRs for a "UI changes" checkbox in the description. If checked, automatically requests reviews from designated UI reviewers and blocks the PR until one of them approves.
